THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: - JUDGMENT AFTER COURT TRIAL. (PURSUANT TO STATEMENT OF DECISION) PROPERTY IN ISSUE WAS HELD BY ALFREDO Z. GAMAD, JR. AND DELIA P. SORIBEN AS JOINT TENANTS REGARDING THEIR 3/4 INTEREST, WITH REMAINING 1/4 INTEREST HELD IN JOINT TENANCY BY ALFREDO G. GAMAD, SR. AND FELICIDAD GAMAD. PLAINTIFFS, ALFREDO G. GAMAD, SR., FELICIDAD GAMAD, AND ALFREDO Z. GAMAD, JR., WILL PAY DEFENDANT DELIA P. SORIBEN THE SUM OF $3,5000.00 FOR HER MORTGAGE PAYMENT ON THE PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF, ALFREDO G. GAMAD, SR., IS AWARDED $630.00 FOR HIS SUPERVISORY AND OTHER WORK PERFORMED ON PROPERTY PRIOR TO SALE. DEFENDANT, DELIA P. SORIBEN, WILL PAY TO PLAINTIFFS $11,636.37 AS HER SHARE OF PLAINTIFFS' ATTORNEY FEES. DEFENDANT, DELIA P. SORIBEN, IS NOT ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HEREIN. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
